scripts.bundle:explore-assets: mkdir -p crates/supersigil-cli/src/commands/explore_assets && pnpm --filter @supersigil/preview run build && pnpm --filter supersigil-website run bundle:standalone && cp website/src/styles/landing-tokens.css website/src/components/explore/styles.css packages/preview/styles/supersigil-preview.css packages/preview/scripts/supersigil-preview.js packages/preview/dist/render-iife.js crates/supersigil-cli/src/commands/explore_assets/
scripts.bundle:cli-assets: pnpm run bundle:explore-assets && rm -rf crates/supersigil-cli/skills && mkdir -p crates/supersigil-cli/skills && cp -r .agents/skills/ss-ci-review .agents/skills/ss-feature-development .agents/skills/ss-feature-specification .agents/skills/ss-refactoring .agents/skills/ss-retroactive-specification .agents/skills/ss-spec-driven-development crates/supersigil-cli/skills/
